prerequisites.value: Aasimar, able to prepare or cast consecrate.

description.value: **Benefit:** A consecrated spell is treated as a maximized spell against evil creatures and creatures with the evil subtype. Against all other creatures, this feat does not modify the spell in any way (for example, a consecrated fireball acts as a normal fireball against neutral or good creatures). This feat does not stack with Maximize Spell. Level Increase: +2 (a consecrated spell uses up a spell slot two levels higher than the spell’s actual level.)
